name: Ember Spark (Stage 1)
description: The initial evolutionary form of the solar flare line. It harnesses primordial thermal energy within its volatile core, emitting gentle warmth when calm and fierce embers when threatened.
originLore: Sparked from the first solar flares during the ignition of the Aetherium core, Ember Spark carries the untamed flame of primordial star formation.

lore.celestialConcordance: Ember Spark stabilizes ambient thermal currents, preventing cold voids from encroaching upon nascent star nurseries.

quantumResonators.name: Spark Ignition
quantumResonators.description: Discharges a flurry of radiant embers that ignite ambient thermal particles.

quantumResonators.name: Solar Spark
quantumResonators.description: Focuses heat into a miniature solar flare that illuminates dark anomalies.
